title: Anti Nightvision
description: Anti Nightvision resource pack ensures fair play by blocking night vision and fullbright effects from resource packs. It works with OptiFine and vanilla Minecraft but does not affect mod-based night vision or fullbright.
body:
# Anti Nightvision

This resource pack is designed to disable night vision and fullbright effects from resource packs when players join a server that has this pack enabled. It effectively neutralizes visibility enhancements from both OptiFine and vanilla Minecraft resource packs, ensuring a fair gameplay environment.

# Features:

Blocks night vision and fullbright effects from resource packs.

Compatible with both OptiFine and vanilla Minecraft.

Helps maintain balanced visibility on multiplayer servers.


# Limitations:

Does not block night vision or fullbright effects from mods (only resource packs).
